item.title: Nick_Metcalfe: Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 20s Lovely to hear that Jo, and to be serious that's what so many fans here in Sheffield
item.description: Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 20s Lovely to hear that Jo, and to be serious that's what so many fans here in Sheffield tell me. They are just so excited to be attending this event. Something to keep in mind amid the madness. Cita Jo C @JoCostello20 · 2min En respuesta a @Nick_Metcalfe Here for the first time and I’m so ridiculously over excited

item.title: Nick_Metcalfe: Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 2min Everyone here just says 'hello Phil' to me now. It's the best thing for my raging un
item.description: Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 2min Everyone here just says 'hello Phil' to me now. It's the best thing for my raging uncontrollable ego. Cita gchq98 @gchq98 · 3h En respuesta a @Nick_Metcalfe I hear people queued overnight to see you both... 44
